text: --- PAGE 1 --- UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF NEW YORK UNITED STATES OF AMERICA, -against- SAMUEL BANKMAN-FRIED, Defendant. ORDER X S6 22-cr-0673 (LAK) LEWIS A. KAPLAN, District Judge. Defendant's motion to elicit testimony from FBI Special Agents Booth and Allain (Dkt 332) is denied. Memorandum to follow in the event of a conviction. SO ORDERED. Dated: October 25, 2023 htla Lewis A. Kaplan United States District Judge
